exploration_log.aha_moment: The `serveFile` helper is a clean choke point for setting response headers; passing the config's cache options through was straightforward.
exploration_log.hindsight: Straightforward. serveFile is the right place to set the Cache-Control header.

alternatives: Set header in ToMiddleware before calling serveFile
Pass config fields through serveFile signature
key_decisions.decision: Pass CacheControl and MaxAge as parameters to serveFile
key_decisions.reasoning: serveFile is already the single place that sets HTTP headers via http.ServeContent; keeping header setting there is cohesive and avoids duplicating the logic at two call sites

solve_notes: Added `CacheControl string` and `MaxAge int` to `StaticConfig`. Updated `serveFile` function signature to accept these values and set `Cache-Control` header before serving. Added documentation to `README.md` and `API_CHANGES_V5.md`.
task_text:
The `StaticConfig.ToMiddleware()` in `middleware/static.go` serves
static files but does not set `Cache-Control`, `ETag`, or
`Last-Modified` headers for cache control. Browsers re-download files
on every request. Add `CacheControl` and `MaxAge` configuration options
to `StaticConfig` that set appropriate cache headers based on the
served file's modification time. Document the new `CacheControl` and
`MaxAge` configuration options in `README.md` under the Static Files
section and add a note to `API_CHANGES_V5.md` about the new fields.

relevant_preexisting_tests.reason: Exercises the static file serving path including the serveFile function call, covering the changed lines

test_selection.test_query: Find tests that verify the behavior of StaticConfig, serveFile, ToMiddleware in middleware/static.go

thrash_preventing_defs.name: ToMiddleware
thrash_preventing_defs.reason: read: an AI agent would read the full ToMiddleware to understand where serveFile is called and whether to set headers before or inside serveFile

tier_difference_reasoning: ToMiddleware is in thrash_preventing because an AI agent would need to read the full method to understand the two serveFile call sites (for index files and regular files) and decide where to place the cache header logic. Without it, the agent might only find one call site and miss the other.
